author: sleepyhauru
description: Logs bans, unbans, kicks, joins, leaves, timeout changes, member updates, and message deletes to a configured mod-log channel.
install_msg: Load it with `[p]load modlog`. Set the current channel as your mod log with `[p]modlog here`.
short: Logs core moderation and member events to a mod-log channel.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild configuration settings for the mod-log channel. It does not store user data.
